Example_EN: I disagree with his plan for the new timetable.
Example_CN: 我不同意他关于新时间表的计划。

Collocation: sore throat;clear your throat;at the throat
Example_EN: She has a sore throat and will stay at home today.
Example_CN: 她喉咙痛，今天会待在家里。

Example_EN: The book offers fresh insight into city life.
Example_CN: 这本书对城市生活提供了新的洞察。

Collocation: tackle a problem;tackle the issue;make a tackle
Example_EN: We need to tackle this problem before it grows.
Example_CN: 我们要在问题扩大前着手解决。

Example_EN: Nothing lasts forever, so enjoy each day.
Example_CN: 没有什么能永恒，所以珍惜每一天。

Example_EN: Do not exceed the speed limit near the school.
Example_CN: 在学校附近不要超速。

Example_EN: The government cut expenditure on road repairs.
Example_CN: 政府削减了道路维修支出。

Example_EN: The children's faces lit up with joy.
Example_CN: 孩子们脸上洋溢着喜悦。

Example_EN: She is six months pregnant and feels tired.
Example_CN: 她怀孕六个月了，感到很累。

Example_EN: He is a reliable friend when trouble comes.
Example_CN: 有麻烦时他是可靠的朋友。

Example_EN: Put the car in first gear before you move.
Example_CN: 起步前先挂一挡。

Example_EN: The famous poet read three new poems tonight.
Example_CN: 那位著名诗人今晚朗诵了三首新诗。

Example_EN: She made a fortune selling handmade jewellery.
Example_CN: 她靠卖手工珠宝发了财。

Example_EN: The opening ceremony begins at ten o'clock.
Example_CN: 开幕式十点开始。

Example_EN: There is a pile of books on the desk.
Example_CN: 桌上有一堆书。

Collocation: farm pig;pig farm;as greedy as a pig
Example_EN: The farm keeps about twenty pigs this year.
Example_CN: 这个农场今年养了大约二十头猪。

Example_EN: Add the milk to the cake mixture and stir.
Example_CN: 把牛奶加入蛋糕糊搅拌。

Example_EN: The lights turn off automatically at midnight.
Example_CN: 午夜时灯光会自动关掉。

Example_EN: She is a leading scholar in medieval history.
Example_CN: 她是中世纪史领域的顶尖学者。

Example_EN: Stress can have a strong psychological effect.
Example_CN: 压力可能产生强烈的心理影响。

Example_EN: House prices rose dramatically last year.
Example_CN: 去年房价大幅上涨。

Example_EN: Too much is at stake to make a careless choice.
Example_CN: 利害攸关，不能草率决定。

Example_EN: A tiny sea creature swam near the rock.
Example_CN: 一只微小的海洋生物在岩石附近游动。

Collocation: business partnership;in partnership with;form a partnership
Example_EN: They formed a business partnership last spring.
Example_CN: 他们去年春天成立了商业合伙关系。

Example_EN: Class participation counts for ten percent of the mark.
Example_CN: 课堂参与占总分的百分之十。

Example_EN: This contract clause protects both buyers and sellers.
Example_CN: 这一合同条款保护买卖双方。

Example_EN: There is a penalty for late payment of fees.
Example_CN: 迟交费用要罚款。

Example_EN: The chamber of commerce meets every Monday.
Example_CN: 商会每月逢周一开会。

Collocation: fancy a drink;fancy dress;take a fancy to
Example_EN: Do you fancy a cup of tea after lunch?
Example_CN: 午饭后想喝杯茶吗？

Example_EN: She reads modern poetry on the train each morning.
Example_CN: 她每天早上在火车上读现代诗。

Example_EN: We had a short chat after the meeting.
Example_CN: 会后我们闲聊了一会儿。

Example_EN: Pack warm clothing for the mountain trip.
Example_CN: 山里旅行请准备保暖衣物。

Collocation: evolve into;evolve over time;continue to evolve
Example_EN: Languages evolve slowly over many centuries.
Example_CN: 语言在多个世纪里缓慢演变。

Collocation: for the sake of;for my sake;for safety's sake
Example_EN: She stayed late for the sake of the team.
Example_CN: 她为了团队留到很晚。

Example_EN: Please put the cups back on the top shelf.
Example_CN: 请把杯子放回顶层架子。

Example_EN: The new ad campaign will boost sales next month.
Example_CN: 新广告活动下月将提振销量。

Example_EN: The dog wagged its tail when we came home.
Example_CN: 我们回家时狗摇着尾巴。

Example_EN: The keys are now in the buyer's possession.
Example_CN: 钥匙现已归买家保管。

Example_EN: The clinic offers advice about pregnancy and abortion.
Example_CN: 诊所提供关于怀孕与堕胎的咨询。

Example_EN: The child was curious about how the clock worked.
Example_CN: 孩子好奇时钟是如何运转的。

Example_EN: They sat on a wooden bench by the lake.
Example_CN: 他们坐在湖边的木长椅上。

Example_EN: The town enjoyed a tourism boom after the new rail line.
Example_CN: 新铁路线开通后该镇迎来旅游潮。

Example_EN: Grandmother told us an old folk tale at night.
Example_CN: 奶奶晚上给我们讲了一个古老民间故事。

Example_EN: They support a more democratic voting system.
Example_CN: 他们支持更民主的投票制度。

Example_EN: Regular maintenance keeps the machine safe.
Example_CN: 定期保养保证机器安全。

Example_EN: It rained hard; consequently the match was delayed.
Example_CN: 雨下得很大，因此比赛推迟了。

Example_EN: Put the soup in a large cooking pot.
Example_CN: 把汤放进大锅里。

Example_EN: The dairy cow produces milk twice a day.
Example_CN: 这头奶牛一天产两次奶。

Example_EN: Exercise will strengthen your back muscles.
Example_CN: 锻炼会增强你的背部肌肉。

Example_EN: Whilst waiting, she finished her report.
Example_CN: 等候时她写完了报告。

Example_EN: Time constraints forced us to cut two scenes.
Example_CN: 时间限制迫使我们删掉两场戏。

Collocation: fold the paper;fold up;fold in half
Example_EN: Please fold the clothes before you pack them.
Example_CN: 打包前请把衣服叠好。

Example_EN: Put the empty bottles in the recycling bin.
Example_CN: 把空瓶放进回收桶。

Example_EN: He will undergo surgery next Tuesday.
Example_CN: 他下周二将接受手术。

Example_EN: This chemical is potentially dangerous if mixed.
Example_CN: 这种化学品若混合可能有危险。

Collocation: scope of;within the scope;beyond the scope
Example_EN: The question is beyond the scope of this lesson.
Example_CN: 这个问题超出了本课范围。

Example_EN: Children often pretend to be doctors and nurses.
Example_CN: 孩子们常假装当医生护士。

Example_EN: The school celebrates cultural diversity each spring.
Example_CN: 学校每年春天庆祝文化多样性。

Example_EN: They allege that the company broke the rules.
Example_CN: 他们声称公司违反了规定。

Collocation: take pride in;pride yourself on;national pride
Example_EN: She takes pride in her careful handwriting.
Example_CN: 她为自己工整的字迹感到自豪。

Example_EN: The runners faced intense heat during the race.
Example_CN: 选手在比赛中遭遇酷热。

Example_EN: The police opened an inquiry into the fire.
Example_CN: 警方对火灾展开调查。
MemoryTip: inquire → inquiry：问询/调查（美拼 inquire）。

Example_EN: She will resign from her post next month.
Example_CN: 她下月将辞去职务。
MemoryTip: re + sign：再次签署辞呈→辞职。

Collocation: craft skill;craft a plan;arts and crafts
Example_EN: He learned the craft of wood carving as a boy.
Example_CN: 他小时候学会了木雕手艺。

Example_EN: Our school has strict rules about mobile phones.
Example_CN: 我校对手机有严格规定。

Example_EN: Give me a concrete example of the problem.
Example_CN: 给我一个具体的问题例子。

Example_EN: We found a pink sea shell on the beach.
Example_CN: 我们在海滩上发现了一枚粉色海贝。

Collocation: damn the noise;damn difficult;I'll be damned
Example_EN: He cursed under his breath but did not damn anyone aloud.
Example_CN: 他低声咒骂，但没当众骂人。

Example_EN: There is a distinct difference between the two maps.
Example_CN: 这两张地图有明显差别。

Example_EN: His sense of humor made the long meeting lighter.
Example_CN: 他的幽默感让漫长会议轻松些。

Example_EN: We must work within the limitation of the budget.
Example_CN: 我们必须在预算限制内行事。

Example_EN: Dark clouds are an indication of coming rain.
Example_CN: 乌云是即将下雨的迹象。

Example_EN: The reforms brought new stability to the market.
Example_CN: 改革给市场带来新的稳定。

Example_EN: It was a wise decision to leave early.
Example_CN: 早走是明智的决定。

Example_EN: Do not neglect your health while studying hard.
Example_CN: 努力学习时不要忽视健康。

Example_EN: She will compose a short piece for the concert.
Example_CN: 她将为音乐会创作一首短曲。

Example_EN: He spent two years in jail for fraud.
Example_CN: 他因诈骗入狱两年。

Example_EN: We took shelter from the rain under a tree.
Example_CN: 我们在树下避雨。

Example_EN: It was a mere misunderstanding, not a real fight.
Example_CN: 那只是误会，不是真打架。

Example_EN: Trees help reduce carbon dioxide in the air.
Example_CN: 树木有助于减少空气中的二氧化碳。

Example_EN: New rules will regulate online advertising.
Example_CN: 新规将规范网络广告。

Example_EN: Would you like cheese on your sandwich?
Example_CN: 三明治要加奶酪吗？

Collocation: trigger a response;pull the trigger;trigger point
Example_EN: Loud noise can trigger her headache again.
Example_CN: 噪音可能再次引发她的头痛。

Example_EN: A broken water pipe flooded the kitchen.
Example_CN: 破裂的水管淹没了厨房。

Example_EN: The storm caused the destruction of many roofs.
Example_CN: 风暴毁坏了许多屋顶。

Example_EN: He is learning to play the guitar this term.
Example_CN: 他这学期在学吉他。

Example_EN: They raised the national flag at sunrise.
Example_CN: 他们在日出时升起国旗。

Example_EN: She practises the piano for one hour daily.
Example_CN: 她每天练钢琴一小时。

Example_EN: The children loved the magic show at school.
Example_CN: 孩子们喜欢学校里的魔术表演。

Example_EN: The police still cannot solve the mystery.
Example_CN: 警方仍无法解开这个谜团。

Example_EN: We plan to ski in the Alps this winter.
Example_CN: 我们计划今冬去阿尔卑斯滑雪。

Example_EN: She leaned over to whisper a secret to me.
Example_CN: 她凑过来低声告诉我一个秘密。

Example_EN: Please wait at the rear of the building.
Example_CN: 请在大楼后面等候。

Example_EN: The lunch menu changes every Friday.
Example_CN: 午餐菜单每周五更换。

Example_EN: This park protects several endangered species.
Example_CN: 这座公园保护多种濒危物种。

Example_EN: A bright full moon lit the quiet street.
Example_CN: 一轮皎洁满月照亮宁静街道。

Example_EN: He is late; presumably the train was delayed.
Example_CN: 他迟到了，大概是火车晚点。

Example_EN: People often say 'bless you' after a sneeze.
Example_CN: 人打喷嚏后常说 bless you。

Example_EN: Which airline flies direct to Edinburgh?
Example_CN: 哪家航空公司直飞爱丁堡？

Collocation: constitutional amendment;propose an amendment;make an amendment
Example_EN: Parliament will vote on the amendment tomorrow.
Example_CN: 议会明天将就修正案表决。
